summary: Reporter answered an overseas hospitality job advert, paid a large fee to an agency called Rapid Overseas Placements, and had their passport withheld on arrival with no job provided.
evidence: Photo of the offer letter; payment receipt
reportMessage: I paid Rapid Overseas Placements for a hotel job abroad. They took my passport and there is no job. Please help me.

summary: Second reporter describes the same agency, Rapid Overseas Placements, collecting fees for jobs in the Gulf that never materialised.
reportMessage: The agency Rapid Overseas Placements took money from me and my cousin for jobs that do not exist.

summary: A witness saw children working during school hours in a garment workshop in the old market and photographed the storefront.
reportMessage: I saw young children working in a garment workshop in the old market during school hours.

transcript.content: I am here with you. What did you see?
I saw children working in a garment workshop in the old market during school hours. I took a photo of the entrance.
Thank you for speaking up. That photo can really help. Do you know roughly how many children, and when you saw them?
About four children, this morning around 10am. They looked very young.

summary: A person in the nightlife district reports being watched and prevented from leaving a venue freely, and asked whether similar alerts existed.
reportMessage: I do not feel free to leave the place I am working at in Neon Heights. Something is wrong.

summary: A survivor of bonded labour at a brick kiln shared their story and an alert to warn others about advance-based debt bondage at riverside kilns.
reportMessage: I was held at a riverside kiln over a debt I could never repay. I want others to be warned.

summary: A young person reported being withdrawn from school for an arranged marriage against their will and requested confidential help.
reportMessage: My family is arranging my marriage against my wishes and I have been taken out of school.

summary: A construction worker signed onto a site via a staffing office in Downtown SE-42, then had wages and documents withheld.
reportMessage: The staffing office in Downtown SE-42 has not paid me and is keeping my documents.

summary: A shopper noticed a minor working long hours at a roadside eatery and reported the location.
reportMessage: There is a child working very long hours at a roadside eatery in the old market.

summary: A survivor moved between two cities reported coercion and requested a safety plan before any police involvement.
reportMessage: I am being controlled and moved between cities. I need to be safe first.

summary: A domestic worker reported being confined to a household without pay and unable to contact family.
reportMessage: I am kept in a house, not paid, and not allowed to call my family.

summary: A student asked NISUP to verify a suspicious overseas job offer from Rapid Overseas Placements before paying any fee.
reportMessage: I received a job offer from Rapid Overseas Placements and want to check if it is a scam before paying.

summary: A passer-by reported workers at a riverside kiln who appeared unable to leave the site.
reportMessage: The workers at the riverside kiln do not seem able to leave. Please check on them.

summary: A survivor escaped after being trafficked from India to Dubai and identifies the man who recruited and controlled her.
evidence: Photos of the recruiter and chat messages
reportMessage: A man named Ravi Kumar trafficked me from India to Dubai and controlled me. I have escaped and want to warn others and see him caught.

summary: A worker in Dubai reports being forced to work with his passport withheld, brought over by the same recruiter.
reportMessage: I was brought to Dubai for a job by a man called Ravi Singh and now my passport is taken and I am forced to work. Please help.
